headline: Macro-Volatility Subsides, Micro-Volatility Ticks Higher
summary: Volatility on Wall Street was lower, at least on an index level. Under the surface, single stock volatility moved in the opposite direction. The CBOE Volatility Index, the VIX, slid 3.3% on Tuesday. The CBOE S&P 500 Constituent Volatility Index rose 0.

headline: VLUE vs. VTV: Does the Value Factor Beat Just Buying Vanguard’s Value ETF?
summary: Two ETFs both claim to buy cheap U.S. large-caps, yet their portfolios look nothing alike and their recent returns are miles apart. The difference comes down to one rule that forces one fund into some very unexpected territory.

raw.headline: VLUE vs. VTV: Does the Value Factor Beat Just Buying Vanguard’s Value ETF?

headline: Themes ETFs Goes Live on SK Hynix as One of AI's Marquee IPOs Hits the Tape
summary: SK Hynix shares are now trading, and Leverage Shares by Themes is right there to meet the moment. The firm has launched the Leverage Shares 2x Long SK Hynix Daily ETF (Ticker: SKHX) alongside the Leverage Shares 1x Short SK Hynix Daily ETF (Ticker: SKHZ), live on Cboe today and built to let traders act on one of this year's most closely watched semiconductor listings from day one.

headline: Does Cboe (CBOE) Expanding Options Hours and Prediction Markets Redefine Its Diversification Story?
summary: Cboe Global Markets has already introduced extended trading hours for select mega-cap single-stock options, including the Magnificent Seven, and launched its Cboe Predicts prediction markets product with Charles Schwab to broaden its offerings and revenue sources. By stretching trading access around the U.S. cash session and adding a new prediction platform, Cboe is seeking to capture more activity during volatile single-stock moves and diversify beyond traditional options fees. headline: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Launches Longer Options Trading And Cboe Predicts
summary: Cboe Global Markets is preparing to launch extended trading hours for select mega cap single stock options. The company is also rolling out a new prediction markets product called Cboe Predicts. Both moves are designed to open fresh trading avenues and address demand for off hours access and new contract types. Cboe Global Markets, ticker BATS:CBOE, is adding these products at a time when its stock trades around $277.13, with a return of 104.7% over the past 3 years and 156.4% over 5 years...
